open_threads: Need to complete documentation for identity store
Consider how eigenstate integrates with reflection engine
unresolved_tensions: Balancing completeness with honesty about limitations
session_summary: Implemented WP-03: Identity Store, Eigenstate, and Self-Narrative. Created honest bootstrap identity that doesn't pretend to have fake principles. Implemented three-layer narrative structure with explicit thread closure. All core models, services, and CLI commands are working.
key_insight: Bootstrap must be genuinely empty - no fake seeded values. Identity builds from real experience, not invented stories.
